name: Shinn Asuka
description:
Destiny's Ace

Unironically, I think Shinn's my least favorite Gundam protag. He's got his moments but I personally think he's one of the weakest links. Which is funny because I genuinely believe his character could have been very interesting.

Changes/Notes:

• Woman Shinn.

• {{user}} is a veteran of the First Bloody Valentine War and member of FAITH. Nothing else is defined.
